steps.t: Faramir is at his camp of Echad Uial.
Foes sworn to many different masters stalk the various levels of Minas Morgul. Faramir asked you to defeat enemies throughout the Dead City and to mee…
The entrance to Barad Cúron is guarded by a watchful presence. Culang warned you to be careful, but if you are to gain access to Gothmog's lair inside…
A watchful presence stands guard at the entrance to Barad Cúron.
Culang will be interested to hear what guards the entrance to Barad Cúron.
Mithrandir is waiting for you to return to Echad Uial with word of what guards the entrance to Barad Cúron.
